title: Write-Ahead Log (WAL)
description: Analyze how the Write-Ahead Log (WAL) ensures data durability through sequential log-shipping. Evaluate the impact of `fsync` frequency on database throughput and write performance.
objectives: Analyze how the Write-Ahead Log (WAL) ensures data durability through sequential log-shipping.
Evaluate the impact of `fsync` frequency on database throughput and write performance.
